name: Domain Lookup
description: Ping selected device types by name and save the DNS domain suffix that resolves them. If a device name contains '/', only the part before '/' is used for DNS lookup.
author: System

inputs.name: device_types
inputs.label: Device Types
inputs.description: Select one or more device types to check in the current site.

inputs.name: strip_catched_prefix
inputs.label: Try without Catched- prefix
inputs.description: For Catched-* devices, also try the name without Catched-.

inputs.name: domain_suffixes
inputs.label: Domain Suffixes
inputs.description: One domain per line. The module tries device, then device.domain for each suffix.

inputs.name: slash_note
inputs.label: Slash Handling
inputs.description: Names with '/' are looked up using only the text before '/'. Do not use '/' inside real hostnames.

inputs.name: skip_mac_names
inputs.label: Skip MAC-only names
inputs.description: Skip devices whose name is only a MAC address.

outputs.name: updated
outputs.description: Number of devices updated with a domain.
